nodes.name: Dicaeum
nodes.summary: Dicaeum（Dicaeum）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联41种鸟类，如眼鏡啄花鳥、金腰啄花鸟、黄冠啄花鸟等41种鸟类。

nodes.name: Andaman flowerpecker
nodes.summary: The Andaman flowerpecker (Dicaeum virescens) is a species of bird in the family Dicaeidae. It is endemic to the Andaman Islands. Behaviour and ecology Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest. References Rasmussen, P.C., and J.C. Anderton. 2005. Birds of South Asia. The Ripley guide. Volume 2: attributes and status. Smithsonian Institution and Lynx Edicions, Washington, D.C., and Barcelona.
nodes.shortSummary: The Andaman flowerpecker (Dicaeum virescens) is a species of bird in the family Dicaeidae. It is endemic to the Andaman Islands.

nodes.name: Andaman flowerpecker
